Migrate Shibnobi To AlienForm
Claim AlienForm $A4M

AlienForm (A4M) is an innovative, decentralized token project that stands at the forefront of transparency, community-led governance, and accountability. With a steadfast commitment to these principles, AlienForm aims to build trust and credibility within the crypto space. This is achieved through a combination of measures, including the use of multi-signature (multi-sig) wallets and the regular publication of monthly financial reports.

The launch of the project is expected in October 2023
TelegramTwitterDiscordRedditYouTube

Stone
Chief Executive Officer (CEO)

Serves as the lead representative of the project. Frequently hosts and participates in Ask Me Anything (AMA) sessions to keep the community informed at all times. Keeps the overview of the project.

Mr. T
Chief Relationship Officer (CRO)

Responsible for seeking out and maintaining strong relationships with the project’s community and partners. Actively searches for opportunities and invitations to gatherings that will help spread awareness and positivity.

Mary Jane
Chief Financial Officer (CFO)

Manages the financial aspects of the project, including budgeting, financial reporting, and strategic financial planning.

Wolf
Chief Blockchain Officer (CBO)

Closely monitors blockchain activity to ensure AlienForm’s A4M token contracts and utility contracts are not manipulated / exploited. Provides technical assistance and knowledge of blockchain technology to the community and other members of the board.

Phoenix
Chief Creative Officer (CCO)

Oversees the creation and management of AlienForm's creative content, ensuring a consistent and engaging brand presence.

Drew

AlienForm owes its continued success to the remarkable efforts of Drew, a pivotal figure who played a crucial role in rescuing the project when Cliff Fettner, the CEO of Shibnobi, abandoned the project in March 2023. Drew's involvement in negotiations with Cliff led to ownership of the Shibnobi project being passed to the community. AlienForm was then founded after the community voted to rebrand the project.

Doug

As an expert in decentralized finance (DeFi) and cyber security, Doug provides valuable advice for the Board of Directors to make safe and sound decisions.
